name: Hua Hin Korea Golf Club
notes: One of Hua Hin's cheapest golf courses. Name history: originally opened as Milford Golf Club (1992) → renamed Milford Paradise Golf Club → The Eagle Milford Golf Club → Hua Hin Seoul Country Club → current name Hua Hin Korea Golf Club (Korean management took over in 2016). The golfdd.com listing uses the parenthetical 'Eagle Milford' as a secondary identifier. Course designed by Robert (Bob) McFarland; 6,614 yards. Located approximately 40 minutes south of Hua Hin centre, near the coast with mountain views. Address: Hua Hin 53, Tambon Hua Hin, Prachuap Khiri Khan 77110. Pricing from golfdd.com: green fee THB 400 for 18 holes everyday; caddie THB 300; cart THB 500 (18 holes). All-in package: THB 800 (green fee + caddie + cart everyday). This is among the lowest-priced 18-hole courses in Thailand. Course conditions described as variable to poor — waterlogged bunkers, unkempt fairways, and patchy greens noted by multiple reviewers; limited investment since Korean management took over. Course is rarely crowded. See also slug 'milford-golf-club' — same property. GPS: 12.435232, 99.969908.
